browse.title: MCP Library
browse.subtitle: Connect Wayland to the tools you already use. One click to install, a switch to turn it on or off.
browse.popularHint: The connectors most people start with

connected.title: Connected MCPs
connected.subtitle: Every MCP server Wayland knows about — live status, tool count, and one place to disconnect, reconnect, or remove any of them.
connected.staleHint: Installed in your agents but not in your config — likely carried over from a prior session.
connected.removeBody: This removes {{name}} and its config from your agents. You can re-add it any time.
connected.removeStaleBody: {{name}} is still installed in your agents but is no longer in your config. Clearing it stops its stale tools from being sent.

card.removeBody: This removes {{name}} and its config from your agents. You can re-add it any time.

detail.notInstalledKeyless: No account needed. Install and it works.
detail.notInstalledAuth: Install, then sign in or add a token to connect.
detail.installAuthNote: Sign-in or a token is required after install.
detail.lifecycleNote: Disable keeps your sign-in. Remove deletes it.
detail.removeBody: This deletes the connector and its sign-in. You can reinstall it any time.
detail.noGuide: This connector installs in one click — no setup steps.
detail.availableEmpty: Not synced to any agent yet.
detail.availableNote: Connectors are available to all your agents while enabled.
detail.notConnectedOauth: Installed. Sign in to connect it.
detail.notConnectedKey: Installed. Add your token to connect it.
detail.saveConnectHint: Paste your key above, then connect.

install.oauthTimeout: Sign-in timed out. Check the client ID/secret and redirect URI, then try again.
install.setupComplete: {{name}} is connected and ready. Ask any chat to use it.

byo.title: Connect {{vendor}} - paste OAuth credentials
byo.universalIntro: {{vendor}} does not allow Wayland to auto-register an OAuth client. Register an OAuth app on the vendor's developer console and paste the credentials below.
byo.redirectLabel: Redirect URI to paste in the vendor console:
byo.clientIdPlaceholder: Paste the client_id from the vendor console

urlAdd.title: Add an MCP server
urlAdd.subtitle: Paste a link from the vendor. Wayland detects how to connect and signs you in.
urlAdd.hint: Paste a server URL from the vendor. Wayland detects the transport and sign-in for you.
urlAdd.needsAuth: This server needs you to sign in
urlAdd.tokenPlaceholder: Paste an API key / access token
urlAdd.advancedHeader: Uses a custom header? (e.g. Readwise X-Access-Token)
urlAdd.invalidUrl: Enter a valid https:// server URL.
urlAdd.unreachable: Could not reach that server. Check the URL and try again.
urlAdd.tokenRejected: The server rejected that token. Double-check it and retry.
